name: S-500 Snow Machine
comment:
Antari S-500 Snow Machine: High performance snow machine in flightcase for touring applications

-Silent DMX snow machine for professional theatrical effects
-Integrated in a flightcase (with castors), applicable for touring
-10-meter long hose for easy rigging on a stand or truss and -remote dispersion
-Adjustable wind volume and flow rate
-Timer function
-Control via stand-alone; DMX; wired remote control (optional); --Wireless remote control upgradeable; W-DMX by wireless solution upgradeable; Timer
-Monochrome LCD display
-Built with NEUTRIK connector
-For application areas such as: Wedding/gala/events; theater; -Rental; video and photography; Clubs/dancing school
-Big tank capacity
-Application possibility: Standing; suspended

Package contents:

1 x device, 1 x user manual, 1 x power cord, 1 x container, 1 x tube

Technical specifications:

-Power supply:	230 V AC, 50 Hz
-Power consumption:	890 W
-Protection class:	Protection class I
-Power connection:	Mains input via PowerCON (blue), mounting version power supply cord with safety plug (provided)
-Tank capacity:	20,0 l Snow fluid
-Fluid consumption:	Approx. 400 ml/min
-DMX input:	1 x 3-pin XLR (M) mounting version
1 x 5-pin XLR (M) mounting version
-DMX output:	1 x 3-pin XLR (F) mounting version
1 x 5-pin XLR (F) mounting version
-Control:	Stand-alone; DMX; wired remote control (optional); Wireless remote control upgradeable; W-DMX by wireless solution upgradeable; Timer
-Housing color:	Black
-Display type:	Monochrome LCD display
-Use of brands:	Built with NEUTRIK connector
-Dimensions:	Width: 55,1 cm
-Depth: 59,2 cm
-Height: 65,1 cm
-Weight:	35,20 kg
-Noise classification:	Class 2 (slight noise)
